name: Peanut Butter Bars for a Crowd
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the eggs, sugars, peanut butter, shortening, and vanilla until smooth.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; gradually add to creamed mixture and mix well.
3. Press into 3 greased 15" x 10" x 1-inch baking pans.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
5. Cool.
6. Dust with confectioners' sugar.
